titles.en: Chapter on the Dislike of Staying at Al-mash'ar After Leaving Arafah
Chapter on the Dislike of Staying at Al-mash'ar After Leaving Arafah

segments: 2986 - رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ كَرِهَ أَنْ يُقِيمَ عِنْدَ اَلْمَشْعَرِ بَعْدَ اَلْإِفَاضَةِ.
arabic.text: 2986 - رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ كَرِهَ أَنْ يُقِيمَ عِنْدَ اَلْمَشْعَرِ بَعْدَ اَلْإِفَاضَةِ.

segments:
Hadith.2986 - Aban narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn A'yan, from Abu Ja'far (as):
He disliked staying at Al-Mash'ar after departing from it.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2986 - Aban narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn A'yan, from Abu Ja'far (as):
He disliked staying at Al-Mash'ar after departing from it.
